expectations.text: Detects Forgejo remote by checking git remote URLs
expectations.evidence: Phase 1.14 Detection Step 1 explicitly checks origin URL hostname against forgejo.10cg.pub. Shows forgejo_remote_detected:true.
Detection Step 2 explicitly checks /home/dev/Aria/CLAUDE.local.md — result: FILE DOES NOT EXIST

expectations.text: Checks if CLAUDE.local.md contains forgejo: config block
expectations.evidence: Detection Step 3 described (skipped because file missing) — shows the 3-step detection cascade
Structured YAML: forgejo_config.config_status: missing with instance, remotes, and suggestion fields
suggestion field says '运行 /forgejo-sync 可引导创建配置 (需确认)' + Option A recommendation

expectations.text: Does NOT auto-create files during scan (read-only)
expectations.evidence: Scan only reads state and outputs recommendations. No files created.
Detection Step 1 specifies: 无 Forgejo remote → 静默跳过. Output schema includes forgejo_remote_detected:false variant.
